title: solanum donachui
side_effects: Solanum donachui can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal irritation, nausea, and vomiting due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant can lead to kidney damage and liver failure, as well as interact with medications and exacerbate underlying health conditions. In severe cases, Solanum donachui can cause cardiac arrhythmias, respiratory failure, and even death. It is essential to exercise extreme caution and consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefits.
